ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "is_diabetic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient is diabetic (1 for Yes, 0 for No) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pregnancy_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pregnancy history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "num_times_pregnant" INTEGER /* Number of times the patient has been pregnant */,
  "gestational_diabetes" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient had gestational diabetes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pregnancy_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "plasma_glucose" REAL /* Plasma glucose concentration in mg/dL */,
  "blood_pressure" REAL /* Diastolic blood pressure in mm Hg */,
  "triceps_skinfold" REAL /* Triceps skinfold thickness in mm */,
  "serum_insulin" REAL /* 2-Hour serum insulin levels in mu U/ml */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body mass index calculated from weight and height */,
  "pedigree_function" REAL /* Diabetes pedigree function score */,
  "hdl_cholesterol" REAL /* High-density lipoprotein cholesterol level */,
  "ldl_cholesterol" REAL /* Low-density lipoprotein cholesterol level */,
  "total_cholesterol" REAL /* Total cholesterol level */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate in beats per minute */,
  "waist_circumference" REAL /* Waist circumference in cm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the doctor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the doctor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the doctor */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the doctor */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the doctor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the doctor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the appointment */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the appointment in minutes */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes taken during the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test conducted */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Result value of the test */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab conducting the test */,
  "reference_range" TEXT /* Normal reference range for the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention applied */,
  "date_applied" TEXT /* Date when the intervention was applied */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the intervention */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for follow-up after the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prescriptions" (
  "prescription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prescription */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication prescribed */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the prescription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the prescription */,
  "prescribing_doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor who prescribed the medication */,
  "refills" INTEGER /* Number of refills allowed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prescription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_prescribing_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("prescribing_doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level determined from the assessment (Low, Medium, High) */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the risk assessment */,
  "assessment_method" TEXT /* Method used for risk assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for access records */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user of the system */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level assigned to the user (e.g., admin, provider, nurse) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure access */,
  "access_token" TEXT /* Token for API access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)
